title: Comply with legal requirements when selling automotive products and services
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Comply with legal requirements when selling automotive products and services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify legal requirements and procedures relating to sale of automotive products and services

pcs.text: Legislation relating to selling automotive products or services is accessed and interpreted1.2 Legal requirements specific to the sale of the automotive workplace product or service range are identified1.3 Workplace procedures relating to complying with legal requirements are sourced and interpreted

elements.title: Sell product or service in compliance with legal requirements

pcs.text: Product or service is sold according to workplace procedures and identified legal requirements2.2 Customer transaction is handled according to consumer legislation2.3 Accurate advice and information are provided to customers about product and consumer rights2.4 Advice is sought from supervisor where clarification or assistance is needed
